productName: SPR - 1g Infused Blunt - Pure Krush x Gushers
description: A indica blunt of Pure Krush taken up a level with concentrate — flower plus potent extract rolled together for a bold, slow-burning, full-flavored smoke. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — earthy, sweet undertones, with settle-in, melt-into-the-couch ease. A little goes a long way.
